userdoc.notice: Library for compressing and decompressing bytes.

devdoc.author: Solady (https://github.com/vectorized/solady/blob/main/src/utils/LibZip.sol)Calldata compression by clabby (https://github.com/clabby/op-kompressor)FastLZ by ariya (https://github.com/ariya/FastLZ)
devdoc.details: Note: The accompanying solady.js library includes implementations of FastLZ and calldata operations for convenience.

documentation.text:
@dev To be called in the `fallback` function.
 ```
     fallback() external payable { LibZip.cdFallback(); }
     receive() external payable {} // Silence compiler warning to add a `receive` function.
 ```
 For efficiency, this function will directly return the results, terminating the context.
 If called internally, it must be called at the end of the function.
